scope-guard.name: scope-guard
scope-guard.summary: Repo-wide default-deny write hook; allows only scoped writes and settings files.

feature-scaffolder.name: feature-scaffolder
feature-scaffolder.summary: Scripts that create and validate feature directories at any path, used to bootstrap new features.

policy-enforcement.name: policy-enforcement
policy-enforcement.summary: Owns the policy anchor documents (philosophy.md and work-guide.md) that govern every agent in the rabbit workflow.

root-management.name: root-management
root-management.summary: Owns the three root-level files users and Claude Code interact with directly: install.sh, CLAUDE.md, and README.md.

auto-refresh.name: auto-refresh
auto-refresh.summary: Periodically re-inject rabbit policy files into the Claude Code session context to defend against silent drift.

bug-filing.name: bug-filing
bug-filing.summary: Schema and operations for filing, transitioning, and querying bugs as filesystem-native artifacts.

feature-skeleton.name: feature-skeleton
feature-skeleton.summary: Defines and enforces the canonical layout of every feature directory, giving every feature the same shape and lifecycle hooks.

hard-rules.name: hard-rules
hard-rules.summary: Staging area for operational rules too specific for philosophy.md or work-guide.md, with deterministic check scripts.

naming-convention.name: naming-convention
naming-convention.summary: Hardens the project naming scheme: user-facing artifacts must use rabbit- prefix and internal scripts use rbt- prefix.

tdd-state-machine.name: tdd-state-machine
tdd-state-machine.summary: Hardens TDD discipline by defining tdd_state transitions, drift detection, and the context block for spawned subagents.

onboard.name: onboard
onboard.summary: Scaffold and maintain project-{name}/ directories and their maps.

install-distribute.name: install-distribute
install-distribute.summary: Distribute the rabbit workflow into a target workspace via a bash installer that copies .claude/ and CLAUDE.md.

policy.name: policy
policy.summary: Canonical rule files fed to subagents; split of work-guide.md and philosophy.md.

contract.name: contract
contract.summary: Meta-feature owning all cross-feature templates, schemas, and dispatch scripts.
